description.value: Aura faint conjuration (healing); CL 5th; Slot belt; Price 5,000 gp; Weight 2 lbs. DESCRIPTION This fine, red leather sheath is decorated with gold filigree. It fits any bladed slashing weapon. While worn, a scabbard of stanching protects against bleed damage. Anytime the wearer suffers a bleed effect, the scabbard automatically stanches it. It has no effect on bleed damage from effects that require a DC 16 or higher caster level or Heal check. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, cure light wounds; Cost 2,500 gp
